from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql.functions import count

spark = SparkSession.builder \
    .appName('GDELT Daily Event Counts') \
    .config('spark.cassandra.connection.host', '127.0.0.1') \
    .getOrCreate()

# Load the GDELT events data
gdelt_df = spark.read.csv('data/gdelt/gdelt_events_sample.csv', header=True, inferSchema=True)

# Calculate the number of events per day
daily_event_counts = gdelt_df.groupBy('event_date').agg(count('*').alias('event_count'))

# Write the results to the Cassandra table
daily_event_counts.write \
    .format('org.apache.spark.sql.cassandra') \
    .mode('overwrite') \
    .options(table='gdelt_daily_counts', keyspace='nl2pipeline') \
    .save()

spark.stop()
